title: Rich Creamy Portuguese Seafood Stew
description: An indulgent, umami-packed stew featuring a velvety coconut milk base, a splash of apple cider vinegar, and a medley of fresh seafood, all wrapped up in classic Portuguese flavors.

ingredients.name: seafood seasoning blend
ingredients.notes: smoked paprika 1 tsp, dried oregano 1 tsp, bay leaf 1/2 tsp

ingredients.name: mixed seafood (cod cubes, shrimp, mussels, clams)

instructions: Warm the saffron in 1 tbsp of warm water until fragrant, then set aside.
Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat. Add diced onion and bell pepper, sauté until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add minced garlic and cook for 1 minute until aromatic.
Stir in tomato paste, diced tomatoes, and the seafood seasoning blend; cook for 3 minutes to meld flavors.
Pour in seafood stock and apple cider vinegar, bringing the mixture to a gentle simmer.
Add the steeped saffron and coconut milk, stirring to combine; let simmer for 5 minutes to develop creaminess.
Gently fold in the cod cubes, then add shrimp, mussels, and clams. Cover and simmer until mussels and clams open and shrimp turns pink, about 8-10 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste, then remove the bay leaf from the pot.
If desired, garnish with lemon zest and serve hot.
Serve over cauliflower rice for a Whole30-compliant option.
